subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1915 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: Sultan 'Abdu'l-Hamid wished to strike terror into my heart; he sent to tell me that I should be imprisoned forever, or executed, or sent to a far-off penal colony. I answered his threats by a message
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
